bugs.error_message: Phase 0B CFRelease(dict) hangs after IOSurfaceCreate timeout
bugs.root_cause: mpd_fcall(MPD_CFRelease.noPAC(), dict) with no timeout, placed BEFORE if (surface != 0n) check. When IOSurfaceCreate timed out, CFRelease hung forever.
bugs.fix: Moved CFRelease inside if (surface != 0n), changed to mpd_fcall_quick

bugs.root_cause: Bare mpd_fcall calls in 0B-alt. After MPD degraded from IOSurfaceCreate timeout, bare mpd_fcall hangs indefinitely.
bugs.fix: Replaced mpd_fcall with mpd_fcall_timeout + timeout checks. Later: skipped 0B-alt entirely (never succeeds, only corrupts fcall state).

bugs.error_message: mpd_read64 hangs after mpd_evaluateScript_nowait PE dispatch
bugs.root_cause: Base functions mpd_read64/mpd_read8/mpd_write64/mpd_write8/mpd_malloc use bare mpd_fcall (no timeout). After mpd_evaluateScript_nowait, fcall mechanism degrades.
bugs.fix: Changed base functions to use mpd_fcall_timeout internally. Fixed bare mpd_fcall in A2-M6 fallback path.

bugs.error_message: M5 Option 2 / spawn_pe hang after 0B-alt timeout corruption
bugs.root_cause: mpd_fcall_timeout corrupts fcall JOP chain when it times out. After ANY timeout, subsequent bare mpd_fcall hangs. 0B-alt mach_task_self/mach_host_self always time out, poisoning all later calls including spawn_pe.
bugs.fix: (1) Changed mpd_fcall() to wrap mpd_fcall_timeout internally (3s). (2) Skipped 0B-alt entirely (if(false)) — never succeeded, only corrupts fcall state.

bugs.root_cause: Was returning: mpd_fcall_internal(address, x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5
bugs.fix: Now returns: mpd_fcall_internal(address, x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: mpd_fcall_timeout should be mpd_fcall
Wrong reference: mpd_fcall_timeout should be mpd_fcall
